name: onchainos-skills
description: Official OKX Onchain OS skills for AI coding assistants across wallet, market, trading, DeFi, payment, and on-chain transaction workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Built for AI. Ready for Web3.
interface.longDescription: Official OKX Onchain OS plugin for Codex, based on the upstream onchainos-skills repository. It brings Agentic Wallet, AI toolkit, trading, payments, token discovery, market data, smart-money signals, wallet and DeFi analysis, security checks, and transaction workflows into Codex through reusable skills.
defaultPrompt: Research this token with OKX Onchain OS skills.
Analyze this wallet's balances, PnL, and DeFi positions.
Plan a swap, payment, or transaction workflow with Onchain OS.
